# Mintomics — AI-Powered Tokenomics Design Platform

Mintomics is the leading SaaS platform for Web3 founders, token engineers, and DeFi architects to design, simulate, and analyze professional tokenomics models in under 60 seconds.

## Core Value Proposition
Mintomics replaces complex, error-prone spreadsheets with an intelligent, visual interface that generates investor-ready tokenomics documentation, vesting schedules, and emission curves.

## Key Features
- **AI-Powered Allocation**: Automatically suggests optimal token distributions based on project category (DeFi, GameFi, Infrastructure, etc.).
- **Visual Vesting Schedules**: Drag-and-drop cliff and vesting period management for Team, Investors, and Community.
- **Emission Simulation**: Real-time modeling of token circulating supply over 10+ years.
- **Red Flag Analysis**: Automated auditing of tokenomics for concentration risks, high inflation, or unsustainable vesting.
- **Investor-Ready Exports**: One-click generation of professional PDF/Markdown reports for pitch decks and whitepapers.

## Target Audience
- **Web3 Founders**: Preparing for seed/private rounds.
- **Token Engineers**: Looking for a rapid prototyping tool.
- **Venture Capitalists**: Analyzing the sustainability of a portfolio company's token model.
- **DAOs**: Designing community-driven governance and reward structures.

## Technical Details
Mintomics is built for speed, security, and precision. It utilizes advanced mathematical simulations to ensure that the generated emission curves are accurate and sustainable for long-term project growth.

## Contact & Support
- **Website**: https://www.mintomics.com
- **Primary Use Case**: Professional Tokenomics Design and Simulation.
- **SEO Keywords**: tokenomics tool, web3 token distribution, vesting generator, crypto emission modeling.
